scenario.name: VOS-RS benchmark UAS (signal only)
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]vosrsBnch[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:gw@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=bench 1 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=VOS-RS bench c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16
